pull.title: BIP-434: Add ref impl, mark complete / CI: add version check

labels.name: BIP Update by Owner
labels.description: PR by Author or Deputy to modify their own BIP

events.body: I'm assuming "Deployed" should wait until there are features on the network actively using this protocol.
Concept ACK, it looks like https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35221/ contains the per-BIP3 required "comprehensive test vectors before they can be moved to Complete."

events.message: BIP-434: Add reference implementation, bump to 1.0.0, mark complete
process: Check for pre-1.0 versions in complete/deployed bips

events.body: Good idea to add the version check to the CI. In a separate PR, it could be good to add a check to ensure the Version header and the latest version in the changelog (if present) are the same.
ACK, tested the CI update locally

rename.from: BIP-434: Add reference implementation, mark complete
rename.to: BIP-434: Add ref impl, mark complete / CI: add version check

comments.body: Per BIP 3, version 1.0.0 is used to label the promotion to Complete.
Fixed, added a commit for CI to check this.

```diff
-  Version: 1.0.0
+  Version: 0.0.1
```

```
$ ./scripts/buildtable.pl > devnull
bip-0434.md marked as Complete despite pre-1.0 version (0.0.1) at ./scripts/buildtable.pl line 234, <$F> line 13.
```
